 542 |     def get_summary_statistics(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 543 |         """
 544 |         获取摘要统计信息
 545 | 
 546 |         Returns:
 547 |             统计信息字典
 548 |         """
 549 |         if not self.session_summaries:
 550 |             return {
 551 |                 "total_summaries": 0,
 552 |                 "total_messages": 0,
 553 |                 "total_tokens": 0,
 554 |                 "avg_importance": 0.0
 555 |             }
 556 | 
 557 |         total_messages = sum(s.message_count for s in self.session_summaries)
 558 |         total_tokens = sum(s.token_count for s in self.session_summaries)
 559 |         avg_importance = sum(s.importance for s in self.session_summaries) / len(self.session_summaries)
 560 | 
 561 |         return {
 562 |             "total_summaries": len(self.session_summaries),
 563 |             "total_messages": total_messages,
 564 |             "total_tokens": total_tokens,
 565 |             "avg_importance": round(avg_importance, 2),
 566 |             "total_files_changed": sum(len(s.files_changed) for s in self.session_summaries),
 567 |             "total_errors": sum(len(s.errors_encountered) for s in self.session_summaries)
 568 |         }
 569 | 
 570 |     # ==================== Phase 2 新增方法 ====================
 571 | 
 572 |     def get_memory_statistics(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 573 |         """
 574 |         获取三层记忆统计信息
 575 | 
 576 |         Returns:
 577 |             统计信息字典
 578 |         """
 579 |         if not self._enable_memory_layers:
 580 |             return self.get_summary_statistics()
 581 | 
 582 |         return self.memory_manager.get_statistics()
 583 | 
 584 |     def search_all_memories(self, query: str, top_k: int = 5) -> List[SessionSummary]:
 585 |         """
 586 |         在三层记忆中检索摘要
 587 | 
 588 |         Args:
 589 |             query: 查询关键词
 590 |             top_k: 返回结果数量
 591 | 
 592 |         Returns:
 593 |             匹配的摘要列表
 594 |         """
 595 |         if not self._enable_memory_layers:
 596 |             return self.search_summaries(query)[:top_k]
 597 | 
 598 |         return self.memory_manager.search(query, top_k)
 599 | 
 600 |     def get_recent_summaries_from_episodic(self, n: int = 5) -> List[SessionSummary]:
 601 |         """
 602 |         从情景记忆获取最近的摘要
 603 | 
 604 |         Args:
 605 |             n: 返回数量
 606 | 
 607 |         Returns:
 608 |             摘要列表
 609 |         """
 610 |         if not self._enable_memory_layers:
 611 |             return self.session_summaries[-n:] if n < len(self.session_summaries) else self.session_summaries
 612 | 
 613 |         return self.memory_manager.get_recent_summaries(n)
 614 | 
 615 |     def clear_all_memories(self):
 616 |         """清空所有三层记忆"""
 617 |         if self._enable_memory_layers:
 618 |             self.memory_manager.clear()
 619 | 
 620 |         # 兼容 Phase 1
 621 |         self.session_summaries.clear()
 622 |         self.history_summary = ""
 623 |         self.messages.clear()
 624 | 
 625 |         print("[Phase 2] 所有记忆已清空")

 629 |         导出所有记忆为可序列化的字典（用于持久化到 sess...
